nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Claude Code agent-skill index for handling Remotion captions; defines the JSON-based `Caption` type contract and links out to the transcribe, display, and import sub-guides. This is bundled third-party agent tooling documentation, not versus-engine's own source.

nodes.name: display-captions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide explaining how to render TikTok-style caption pages with `@remotion/captions`, covering fetching caption JSON, grouping into pages, rendering via `<Sequence>`, and per-word highlighting. External reference documentation bundled with the repo's agent tooling, not project-specific code.
nodes.languageNotes: Illustrates Remotion patterns (useDelayRender, Sequence timing math, TikTokPage token highlighting) that could inform this project's own caption rendering if Versus Engine later adds spoken narration or subtitles.

nodes.name: import-srt-captions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide on importing existing .srt subtitle files into Remotion via `parseSrt()` from `@remotion/captions`, including install instructions and a fetch-and-parse example component. External reference documentation bundled with the repo's agent tooling.

nodes.name: transcribe-captions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide on transcribing audio into caption JSON using `@remotion/install-whisper-cpp` (downloading Whisper.cpp, running a model, and post-processing with `toCaptions()`). External reference documentation bundled with the repo's agent tooling.
